final_prompt.prompt:
Create a professional product shot of a smartwatch on a marble surface with coffee and notebook, business lifestyle context.

Style/medium: professional product photography, minimalist commercial aesthetic, clean editorial style
Composition: three-quarter overhead angle, shallow depth of field with focus on smartwatch, balanced triangular arrangement of objects
Subject: modern smartwatch with visible screen and metallic case, positioned as hero product
Scene/backdrop: white or light grey marble countertop, ceramic coffee cup with saucer, closed leather-bound notebook with pen
Lighting/mood: soft natural window light from left side, gentle shadows, calm and sophisticated atmosphere
Color palette: neutral tones (white marble, beige coffee, dark leather) with metallic watch as focal accent
Materials/textures: polished cold marble veins, brushed metal watch case, smooth ceramic glaze, textured leather grain
Avoid: cluttered composition, artificial studio lighting, oversaturated colors, generic stock photo look, 8K stuffer words
